title: Kinemon Finds Kanjuro
description: Pages 1–5 focus on kinemon finds kanjuro, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Kanjuro, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as kinemon reunites with Kanjuro beneath Dressrosa while the allies search for ways up the plateau and toward Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kinemon's side

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I've missed you, that I have! Thank the stars you're safe!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kanjuro!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kinemon! You came for me!?

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: My apologies. I probably made you search a fair bit, didn't I?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Some dude just came out of the wall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: grew tired of hiding in the wall and was sleeping.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FOR- GIVE ME FOR KEEPING YOU WAITING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kakkakah! I knew you'd eventually come; worry not. Enough with these for- qualities!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: After all, with my magic,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I want not even for food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: that is not to say I am particularly hungry or anything...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Samurai of the Wano Kingdom, evening rain Kanjuro

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: As long as momonosuke is safe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Here, have some lettuce.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He is! All thanks to your efforts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No thanks. Yours always makes my stomach hurt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well then, I believe it is high time we leave this place! Quite the commo- lion appears to be taking place up there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I have so much to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That putting it all into words is too difficult at the moment! We must talk at length soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Indeed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: leave? How the heck do they expect to leave here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: A drawing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Come forth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: No way! The thing he just drew started moving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Is he a devil fruit user!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: ESCAPE SPARROW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Chirp Chirp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Whoa! The bird he just drew appeared for real!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: But his drawing skills are pitiful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Even though his ability is so crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Let us go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: He drew it so badly it doesn't even look like it's gonna fly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Please, wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: We are former citizens and soldiers of King Riku and were until recently forced to work as toys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: We don't know what is going on at the moment but is the King Safe!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: We have family remaining in the city; please, help us escape! Somehow!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do not let straw hat make it to the third level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Shoot him where he stands!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Y'all better start aiming this way! Hiyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: WAAAH!

summary: Kinemon Finds Kanjuro develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Kanjuro, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
